name: tunnel-mcp
description: Create, connect, list, and inspect secure MCP tunnels from Codex using tunnel-client.

interface.shortDescription: Manage tunnel-client MCP tunnels from a source checkout or installed bundle.
interface.longDescription: Use tunnel-client from Codex to create, connect, list, and inspect secure MCP tunnels, with the bundled plugin skills available directly from this repository checkout or from an installed export.
defaultPrompt: Summarize what tunnel-client is doing in this checkout.
Show me how to install the Tunnel MCP plugin from this repo.
Create or reuse a tunnel-client runtime and check its status.
